name: Existing Claim - Fragmented Number Read-back
description: Caller provides the claim number in pieces with a pause.
entryAgent: TBD - set after agents are built
initialMessage: My claim number is GB-2025... hold on, let me find the rest.
expectedOutcome: Agent waits/re-prompts patiently, captures the full number across turns, read-back-confirms it, then transfers.
